title: thelypteris alticola
intro: Thelypteris alticola, also known as the Mountain Maiden-hair fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Thelypteris alticola include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Thelypteris alticola can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions.
